About Matt

Hi, I'm Matt Rigby

As a fully qualified personal trainer based at Deadly Dozen Institute of Fitness Racing, George Street, Macclesfield, I want to help you overcome your obstacles — whatever they look like.

My own journey took me from overweight non-runner to Team UK Age Group Athlete at the 2019 OCR World Championships, and then to becoming Europe's Toughest Mudder Age Group Champion in August 2021.

It doesn't matter if you haven't exercised for years, you're recovering from injury, or you just want the extra push. I'll build an achievable plan around you. Your goals become my goals.

Stronger. Fitter. Feel better. Great starts here.

🥇
European Title

From overweight non-runner to European Age Group Champion. Matt's personal journey is proof that with the right mindset and training, anything is possible — no matter your starting point.

"

"I quit alcohol for good aged 50, lost 4 stone, and am now in the top 10% of my age group for running pace. Never ever give up, believe in yourself."

— Simon Spurrell, #mrptexperience member

Get Involved

Ready to Run With Us?

Three easy ways to take the first step — no experience needed, no pressure, just good people and great running.

👀
See What We're About

Check out the run club on Facebook — see our routes, events, member posts and the community vibe before you commit to anything.

02

Request a Taster Run

Come along for a free taster session with no strings attached. Meet the group, try a session and see if it's for you — we think you'll love it.

Request a Taster Run →

Loved it? Sign up for the 2026 annual membership and become a full member of the Rundamentalist Run Club community.

Get Membership Info →

Questions? Message Matt directly on Facebook or call 07769 211684

Community

Rundamentalist
Run Club

Established in October 2018, the Rundamentalist Run Club is home to runners of all abilities in Macclesfield and Cheshire. We're not just a club — we're a community built on encouragement, progress and fun.

Whether you're a complete beginner looking to tackle your first 5K or a seasoned runner wanting a supportive group to train with, there's a place for you here.

All abilities welcome
Structured coaching
0–5K programmes
Race prep & events
Annual membership
Supportive community
Join on Facebook
📍 Location

Based in Macclesfield, Cheshire. Sessions and routes updated regularly — join the Facebook group for the latest meeting points and times.

🎽 Annual Membership 2026

Annual subscription available giving you full access to Run Club 2026 and all current season courses. Get in touch to sign up.

🏁 0–5K Programme

Never run before? No problem. The 2025 0-5K programme is designed to get you from zero to your first 5K with structured weekly sessions and full coaching support.

Get in Touch

Ready to Start?

Taster sessions are available — get in touch and let's talk about your goals. When you join the #mrptexperience, your goals become my goals.
